description_long: This curtain features a vertically pleated design with a wavy, corrugated texture running from top to bottom. The main body of the curtain is a light beige or off-white color, with a central panel in a warm tan or light brown shade, giving the appearance of a layered or partially drawn fabric. The top edge is straight and uniform, while the pleats create a sense of depth and texture across the surface. The curtain appears to be made of a lightweight, semi-opaque fabric, suitable for diffusing light while maintaining privacy. The overall look is simple and modern, with no visible decorative embellishments or hardware.
description: A vertically pleated curtain with a light beige base and a central tan panel, featuring a wavy, corrugated texture and a simple, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pleated curtain with a central tan panel and light beige sides.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and pronounced corrugated pleats of the curtain.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the pleated structure and color pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and vertical pleats.
attribute_fabric_pattern: solid color with central contrasting panel
